overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showing an elevated highway winding through dense urban architecture with large digital billboards and a transmission tower. The camera slowly pans left across the scene while billboard advertisements change content, showcasing the game's atmospheric neon lighting and high-rise buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city overlook with elevated highway and digital billboards

events.description: digital billboard on the right transitions from red text advertisement to character portrait display

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from high vantage point, slowly panning left across the cityscape

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower with red warning lights on the left side of the frame
large vertical billboard initially displaying red Japanese text characters
curving multi-lane highway with streams of vehicle headlights visible in the distance
cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high-angle nighttime view of a cyberpunk city, with a transmission tower visible on the left and a red digital billboard on the right. The camera slowly pans left across the urban landscape, revealing winding highways with light traffic. Around the 8-second mark, the billboard changes from red text to display a character portrait, while the transmission tower gradually shifts toward the center-left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city overlook with elevated highway

agents.ego_description: continuing slow leftward pan across the cityscape, maintaining focus on the highway and billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow leftward pan across the cyberpunk cityscape. The transmission tower has shifted to the left-mid position, while the digital billboard continues displaying the character portrait. The elevated highway remains visible in the center with sparse traffic movement, and the atmospheric haze creates depth in the distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city overlook with holographic advertising

events.description: digital billboard transitions to display a large cyan holographic face with glitch effects

agents.ego_description: maintaining slow panoramic observation of the cityscape, focusing on the newly activated holographic display

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the digital billboard transitioning to a prominent cyan holographic face display that dominates the right side of the frame. The camera continues panning left, bringing the transmission tower closer to the left edge while maintaining the wide view of the illuminated highway below. The holographic advertisement pulses with cyan light, contrasting against the dark overcast sky and the warm orange streetlights along the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape, shifting from a red-toned urban vista to a scene dominated by cyan holographic light. It begins with a high-angle view featuring a transmission tower and a red digital billboard, moving slowly to reveal winding highways with sparse traffic. As the camera glides, the billboard transitions from red text to a character portrait while the transmission tower gradually shifts toward the center-left of the frame amidst an atmospheric haze. The scene then evolves as the advertisement transforms into a prominent cyan holographic face that pulses against the dark overcast sky. Finally, the camera continues its steady movement, pushing the transmission tower toward the left edge while contrasting the cool holographic glow with the warm orange streetlights along the illuminated road below.
